## 🎯 Type of Change

- [ ] `fix`: Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] `feat`: New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] `docs`: Documentation update (e.g., this file, README)
- [ ] `content`: Content update (e.g., new kanji, vocab, or fonts in `/static/`)
- [ ] `style`: UI/Theme changes (e.g., Tailwind, CSS, new themes)
- [ ] `refactor`: Code refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] `test`: Test update (adding missing tests or correcting existing tests)
- [ ] `chore`: Build, CI/CD, or dependency updates

Add dark mode toggle to landing page
prs.body: Introduced a dark mode toggle on the landing page to improve accessibility and user comfort. The toggle allows users to seamlessly switch between light and dark themes, enhancing readability and overall user experience.

prs.title: Refine UI of Donate page for better visual appeal and update PDF SVG
prs.body:
## 📝 Description This PR improves the overall UI to make the website more visually appealing and user-friendly. It also updates the SVG used for PDF-related components to ensure better consistency and rendering across devices. These changes are purely visual and do not impact existing functionality. ## 🔗 Related Issue Fixes # ## 🔄 Type of Change - [ ] 📱 New Feature (new page, component, or functionality) - [x] 🎨 UI/UX Update (visual changes, styling improvements) - [ ] 📖 Content Update (text changes, documentation) - [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix - [ ] ⚡ Performance Improvement - [x] ♿ Accessibility Enhancement - [ ] 🔒 Security Update - [ ] 📦 Dependency Update - [ ] 🧹 Code Refactoring - [ ] 🧪 Test Updates ## 📷 Visual Changes

Checked for layout shifts, broken styles, and console errors ## ♿ Accessibility - [x] Proper heading hierarchy maintained - [x] ARIA labels added where needed - [x] Color contrast requirements met - [x] Keyboard navigation works correctly - [x] Screen reader testing performed ## 📋 PR Checklist - [x] My code follows the project's coding style guidelines - [x] I have tested these changes locally - [x] I have updated the documentation accordingly - [x] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors - [x] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works - [x] All existing tests pass successfully - [x] I have checked for and resolved any merge conflicts - [x] I have optimized images/assets (if applicable) - [x] I have validated all links are working correctly ## 💭 Additional Notes No functional or backend changes were introduced. This PR focuses on UI consistency, visual polish, and improved asset quality.

prs.title: Fixed Dark mode and light mode sync & Made Back to scroll button more appealling and smooth
prs.body:
---
name: Fixed Dark mode and light mode sync & Made Back to scroll button more appealling and smooth
about: Fixed theme desynchronization causing navbar and body to switch modes inconsistently, made Back to scroll button more appealling and smooth
---

## 📝 Description

This PR fixes an issue where the website navbar and body were not switching themes in sync when toggling between light, dark, and system modes.

The problem was caused by hydration mismatch and inconsistent application of Tailwind `dark:` classes. This update ensures the theme is applied at the root level and prevents UI desynchronization and flickering.

---

## 🔗 Related Issue

Fixes #759 #765 

---

## 🔄 Type of Change

- [ ] 📱 New Feature (new page, component, or functionality)
- [x] 🎨 UI/UX Update (visual changes, styling improvements)
- [ ] 📖 Content Update (text changes, documentation)
- [x] 🐛 Bug Fix
- [ ] ⚡ Performance Improvement
- [x] ♿ Accessibility Enhancement
- [ ] 🔒 Security Update
- [ ] 📦 Dependency Update
- [x] 🧹 Code Refactoring
- [ ] 🧪 Test Updates

---

## 📷 Visual Changes

<details>
BEFORE: issue #759 

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/28688cfb-a52a-4f95-ba40-d9b595657e96


AFTER:issue #759 

![fixpreview1](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c3a5a011-fe13-41d1-855a-85010ffb8896)


BEFORE: issue #765 

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e7772ab4-c7ca-4526-beeb-530f21ca57cf


https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a2ff481c-f05c-42ec-8d36-8546d5cbcf7b

AFTER: issue #765 

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f456cf05-7be4-44aa-bc36-869eb532abec


https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9671e402-5c12-4422-8621-3943590db654



<summary>Screenshots / GIFs</summary>

Before: Navbar and body switched themes at different times causing flicker.  
After: All components now switch themes simultaneously with no mismatch.

</details>

---

## 🧪 Testing Performed

### 📱 Browser Compatibility

- [x] Chrome (Version: Latest)
- [x] Firefox (Version: Latest)
- [x] Safari (Version: Latest)
- [x] Edge (Version: Latest)
- [x] Mobile Chrome (Device: Android)
- [x] Mobile Safari (Device: iPhone)

### 🖥️ Responsive Design

- [x] Desktop (1200px+)
- [x] Tablet (768px - 1199px)
- [x] Mobile (320px - 767px)

### ✅ Test Cases

1. Toggle Light → Dark → System and verify navbar and body update together.
2. Refresh page in each theme mode and confirm no flicker or mismatch.
3. Change OS system theme while site is in system mode and verify instant sync.

---

## ♿ Accessibility

- [x] Proper heading hierarchy maintained  
- [x] ARIA labels added where needed  
- [x] Color contrast requirements met  
- [x] Keyboard navigation works correctly  
- [x] Screen reader testing performed  

---

## 📋 PR Checklist

- [x] My code follows the project's coding style guidelines  
- [x] I have tested these changes locally  
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly  
- [x] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors  
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix works  
- [x] All existing tests pass successfully  
- [x] I have checked for and resolved any merge conflicts  
- [ ] I have optimized images/assets (if applicable)  
- [x] I have validated all links are working correctly  

---

## 💭 Additional Notes

This update ensures the theme is applied atomically at the root level using CSS variables, preventing hydration mismatch and keeping all UI components visually consistent during theme changes.

prs.title: Removed unwanted console log
prs.body: Removed unwanted console log from loader.js which was appearing while loading the website.

issues.title: Improve Scroll-To-Top Button with Smooth Fade Transitions
issues.body:
Right now, the scroll-to-top button just pops in and out of the screen, which feels abrupt and a little unpolished. It would be better if it appeared and disappeared smoothly and had a cleaner design so it feels like a natural part of the product instead of an afterthought.

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/55ef0873-3475-4876-9289-bc376ba1d8f1

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f7e67b1c-fbdc-42a3-96d0-9a737b628a22
